text.message: that just fell in blue's lap
this is the issue with this game. When you place better than everyone else, people gang up
then the weaker placers catch up.
people just don't understand the game, which is why 1v1 is the only way to play this game.
WHen you have 4 people and half of them can't think, it makes it tough
blacks move was objectively d umb. He had to get major 10s (which he got)
but sometimes this game is funny and rewards the d umb players
red what can you give away
why give everything to red when I didnt target you
and red was the one that took your resource
i blocked there cuz Black has 3 on it?
you probably win the game if you go the other way
as I calculate when i went there
but you know.... hard to account for someone being an i diot
